migration_lanes.target: Firebase/Firestore collections keyed by channel, language, state, and publish window
migration_lanes.reason: Queue and upload state change every run and should not be merged through Git.

migration_lanes.target: Object storage plus compacted daily snapshots committed to Git
migration_lanes.reason: Append-heavy JSONL/CSV data creates repository churn and merge pressure.

migration_lanes.target: External run ledger with Git storing reports, not live locks
migration_lanes.reason: Operational locks, quota ledgers, and markers are control-plane state.

commands: Keep Git for code, dashboards, and reviewed daily/weekly snapshots.
Move queue, upload intents, raw analytics, quota ledgers, and run markers behind a storage adapter.
Block new features that add live-state files without a migration lane.
